title: Undergraduate Student
about:
I am an undergraduate student at China Three Gorges University (CTGU), majoring in Hubei Innox Academy (Three Gorges). My research interests include image processing and computer vision. I am passionate about exploring the frontiers of visual intelligence and its applications.

Feel free to reach out if you are interested in collaboration or have any questions about my work.

news.content: Started my undergraduate journey at China Three Gorges University.

projects.name: Fully Autonomous Logistics Handling Cart
projects.brief: STM32 + Raspberry Pi dual-controller, mecanum wheels, 6-DOF robotic arm, visual recognition
projects.desc: A fully autonomous logistics handling cart based on the STM32 + Raspberry Pi dual-controller architecture. Features mecanum wheel omnidirectional movement, a 6-DOF robotic arm, and visual recognition for grasping and placement tasks.

projects.name: 2D Solar Tracking System
projects.brief: STM32F103C8T6 dual-axis solar tracking with auto/manual modes and TFT display
projects.desc: A dual-axis solar tracking system based on STM32F103C8T6. Supports real-time tracking of sunlight intensity in four directions (up/down/left/right) using photoresistors, with automatic and manual control modes, TFT display for sensor data and battery level.
